design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and function-first. Color is used strictly for hierarchy and state signaling. Emphasizes clean data representation through sharp borders, monospace typography for technical data, and high-density layouts suitable for inventory control.

typography.font_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' Tech Pair: Sharp authoritative headings with sterile, highly legible body.

rules: No gradients anywhere. Solid colors only.
Primary color (#002FA7) is reserved ONLY for primary CTAs, active links, and key positive data points.
Destructive color is Signal Red, Warning is pure Amber.
All grays are slightly tinted with Zinc (cool gray).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense and compact for tables (p-2 to p-4), generous for page wrappers (p-8 to p-12).

structure.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, bg-background, border-r border-border. Clean list of nav items.
structure.top_header: Sticky top, h-16, backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80, border-b border-border. Used for breadcrumbs, user profile, and global actions.
structure.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. KPI cards span 1 column. Charts/Tables span 3 or 4 columns.

surface_strategy.tables: border-collapse. border-b border-border on rows. No vertical borders.

modifications.Table: Dense padding (py-3 px-4). text-sm. Use monospace font for IDs and SKUs.
modifications.Badge: rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 border

specific_features.stock_indicator: Use a dot indicator + text. Red dot for out of stock, Amber dot for low stock, Green dot for in stock. Or use solid Badge.
specific_features.order_total: Auto-calculated field should be highlighted with a subtle bg-muted p-4 border border-border flex justify-between items-center text-lg font-bold.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must explicitly define hover colors (e.g. hover:bg-primary/90). Table rows should have hover:bg-muted/50.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in on load (animate-in fade-in duration-300).
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Dashboard summary cards should fade in with a slight upward translation, staggered by 100ms.

media_and_icons.icon_style: Regular weight, 20px size for nav, 16px for inline actions.

login_split_background.description: Clean modern empty warehouse architecture. Use as a full-bleed background on the right half of the login page with a subtle black/20 overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: ALL interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-order-button', data-testid='sku-input').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure black/white text over primary/warning/destructive backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Visible focus rings on all inputs and buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' in index.html.
Configure Tailwind with the exact CSS variables provided. Set radius to 0.125rem.
Build a fixed left sidebar layout. Main content should have a slight off-white/gray background (bg-secondary/30) to make the pure white cards pop.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. Use dense, tight spacing.
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography.
Ensure the login page is a 50/50 split layout using the provided warehouse image on one side and a clean login form on the other.
IMPORTANT: Do not use HTML inputs like type='date' or <select>. Rely heavily on customized Shadcn components for forms.
